meaning: n.<美口>(尤指空军)飞机驾驶员
examples: NASA's astronauts used to be largely a corps of Air Force pilots with the near-perfect vision that goes along with being a young daredevil flyboy.
Now the beleaguered airline owned by Indian beer magnate-turned-flyboy Vijay Mallya is finally getting buried.
So into the garbage chute, flyboy.
